languages.text: "Я передам ваше решение блюстителям. Они организуют присмотр за людьми. Обратитесь ко мне на мостике, если пожелаете почтить шествие своим личным вниманием".

traits.locale_text: "Я передам ваше решение блюстителям. Они организуют присмотр за людьми. Обратитесь ко мне на мостике, если пожелаете почтить шествие своим личным вниманием".

languages.text: "I will inform the enforcers of your decision. They will ensure the people are monitored. Should you wish to personally honour the procession with your presence, please speak to me on the bridge."
languages.original_text: "Я передам ваше решение блюстителям. Они организуют присмотр за людьми. Обратитесь ко мне на мостике, если пожелаете почтить шествие своим личным вниманием".

traits.locale_text: "I will inform the enforcers of your decision. They will ensure the people are monitored. Speak to me on the bridge should you wish to honour the procession with your personal presence."
"I will inform the enforcers of your decision. They will ensure the people are monitored. Speak to me on the bridge should you wish to honour the procession with your personal presence."
"I will inform the enforcers of your decision. They will ensure the people are monitored. Speak to me on the bridge should you wish to personally honour the procession with your presence."
"I will inform the enforcers of your decision. They will ensure the people are monitored. Speak to me on the bridge should you wish to personally honour the procession with your presence."
"I will inform the enforcers of your decision. They will ensure the people are monitored. Should you wish to personally honour the procession with your presence, please speak to me on the bridge."

languages.text: "Ich werde die Enforcer über Eure Entscheidung informieren. Sie werden eine Überwachung der Leute gewährleisten. Bitte sprecht mich auf der Brücke an, falls Ihr die Prozession mit Euer Anwesenheit beehren wollt."
languages.original_text: "I will inform the enforcers of your decision. They will ensure the people are monitored. Should you wish to personally honour the procession with your presence, please speak to me on the bridge."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde die Enforcer über Eure Entscheidung informieren. Sie werden eine Überwachung der Leute gewährleisten. Bitte sprecht mich auf der Brücke an, falls Ihr die Prozession mit Euer Anwesenheit beehren wollt."

languages.text: « Je ferai part de votre décision aux prévôts. Ils veilleront à ce que l'équipage soit bien encadré. Venez me parler sur la passerelle si vous souhaitez bénir la procession de votre présence. »
languages.original_text: "I will inform the enforcers of your decision. They will ensure the people are monitored. Should you wish to personally honour the procession with your presence, please speak to me on the bridge."

traits.locale_text: « Je ferai part de votre décision aux prévôts. Ils veilleront à ce que l'équipage soit bien encadré. Venez me parler sur la passerelle si vous souhaitez bénir la procession de votre présence. »

languages.text: “我会将您的决定告知执法者，让他们好好监视人群。如果您愿意赏光，出席游行仪式，请到舰桥找我。”
languages.original_text: "I will inform the enforcers of your decision. They will ensure the people are monitored. Should you wish to personally honour the procession with your presence, please speak to me on the bridge."

traits.locale_text: “我会将您的决定告知执法者，让他们好好监视人群。如果您愿意赏光，出席游行仪式，请到舰桥找我。”

languages.text: «Informaré al personal de seguridad de su decisión. Se ocuparán de tener vigilada a la gente. Si decide honrar la procesión con su presencia, no dude en informarme de ello en el puente».
languages.original_text: "I will inform the enforcers of your decision. They will ensure the people are monitored. Should you wish to personally honour the procession with your presence, please speak to me on the bridge."

traits.locale_text: «Informaré al personal de seguridad de su decisión. Se ocuparán de tener vigilada a la gente. Si decide honrar la procesión con su presencia, no dude en informarme de ello en el puente».

languages.text: 「あなたのご決断をエンフォーサーたちに伝えます。彼らが人々の監視を確実に行うでしょう。もし行列にご自身の臨席を賜りたいとお望みでしたら、ブリッジにいる私にお申し付けください。」
languages.original_text: "I will inform the enforcers of your decision. They will ensure the people are monitored. Should you wish to personally honour the procession with your presence, please speak to me on the bridge."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたのご決断をエンフォーサーたちに伝えます。彼らが人々の監視を確実に行うでしょう。もし行列にご自身の臨席を賜りたいとお望みでしたら、ブリッジにいる私にお申し付けください。」

languages.text: "Kararınızı infazcılara bildireceğim. İnsanların gözetim altında tutulmasını sağlayacaklardır. Eğer varlığınızla töreni bizzat onurlandırmak isterseniz lütfen köprüde benimle konuşun."
languages.original_text: "I will inform the enforcers of your decision. They will ensure the people are monitored. Should you wish to personally honour the procession with your presence, please speak to me on the bridge."

traits.locale_text: "Kararınızı infazcılara bildireceğim. İnsanların gözetim altında tutulmasını sağlayacaklardır. Eğer varlığınızla töreni bizzat onurlandırmak isterseniz lütfen köprüde benimle konuşun."
